rules:
Attach a Pokémon Tool to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it.

The Pokémon this card is attached to has no Weakness.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Discard a Special Energy attached to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Search your deck for a Water Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

You can play this card only if 1 of your Pokémon was Knocked Out during your opponent's last turn.

Search your deck for up to 2 cards and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

Shuffle your hand into your deck and flip a coin. If heads, draw 7 cards. If tails, draw 4 cards.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

This card can only be attached to Fairy Pokémon. This card provides Fairy Energy only while this card is attached to a Fairy Pokémon.

Prevent all effects of your opponent's attacks, except damage, done to the Fairy Pokémon that this card is attached to. (Existing effects are not removed.)

(If this card is attached to anything other than a Fairy Pokémon, discard this card.)

This card can only be attached to Metal Pokémon. This card provides Metal Energy only while this card is attached to a Metal Pokémon.

The attacks of your opponent's Pokémon do 10 less damage to the Metal Pokémon this card is attached to (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

(If this card is attached to anything other than a Metal Pokémon, discard this card.)

Attach a Pokémon Tool to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it.

The Pokémon this card is attached to has no Weakness.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

Each Basic Pokémon in play, in each player's hand, and in each player's discard pile has no Abilities.

This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play. If another card with the same name is in play, you can't play this card.

Each player's evolved Pokémon can use any attack from its previous Evolutions. (That player still needs the necessary Energy to use each attack.)

This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play. If another card with the same name is in play, you can't play this card.

Once during each player's turn, that player may discard a Fire or Fighting Energy card from his or her hand. If that player does so, he or she draws 2 cards.

This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play. If another card with the same name is in play, you can't play this card.

Once during each player's turn, that player may heal 30 damage from each of his or her Water Pokémon and Lightning Pokémon.

This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play. If another card with the same name is in play, you can't play this card.

Search your deck for a Pokémon with the same name as 1 of your Pokémon in play, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Choose 1 of your Basic Pokémon in play. If you have a Stage 2 card in your hand that evolves from that Pokémon, put that card on the Basic Pokémon. (This counts as evolving that Pokémon.) You can't use this card during your first turn or on a Basic Pokémon that was put into play this turn.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Shuffle your hand into your deck and flip a coin. If heads, draw 7 cards. If tails, draw 4 cards.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

Attach a Pokémon Tool to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it.

When your Active Pokémon is Knocked Out by damage from an opponent's attack, you may move 1 basic Energy card that was attached to that Pokémon to the Pokémon this card is attached to.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Each player switches his or her Active Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon. (Your opponent switches first. If a player does not have a Benched Pokémon, he or she doesn't switch Pokémon.)

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Put 2 basic Energy cards from your discard pile into your hand.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Spring Tides
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Ocean Cyclone
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: A mythical Pokémon said to have swelled the seas with rain and tidal waves. It battled with Groudon.

attacks.name: Psy Bolt
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: Its swimming form is exquisitely elegant. With its thin mouth, it feeds on seaweed that grows between rocks.

attacks.name: Captivate
attacks.effect: Switch 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon with his or her Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Psychic
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: Its swimming form is exquisitely elegant. With its thin mouth, it feeds on seaweed that grows between rocks.

attacks.name: Powerful Storm
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage times the amount of Energy attached to all of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Crunch
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: It lives deep in the sea. With a tail shaped like a small fish, it attracts unsuspecting prey.

attacks.name: Shell Protection
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, if this Pokémon would be damaged by an attack, prevent that attack's damage done to this Pokémon if that damage is 50 or less.

flavorText: It is protected by a sturdy shell. Once in a lifetime, it makes a magnificent pearl.

attacks.name: Knock Over
attacks.effect: You may discard any Stadium card in play.

attacks.name: Frozen Splash
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Fighting Pokémon, this attack does 70 more damage.

flavorText: It shatters drift ice with its strong tusks. Its thick layer of blubber repels enemy attacks.

attacks.name: Freezing Headbutt
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: Be it Spheal or a Poké Ball, it will spin any round object on its nose with the greatest of ease.
They can't swim well yet, and they move much faster by rolling. When they're happy, they clap fins.

attacks.name: Ball Roll
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: Its body is covered in fluffy fur. The fur keeps it from feeling cold while it is rolling on ice.

attacks.name: Aqua Swirl
attacks.effect: You may have your opponent switch his or her Active Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: It is the world's most beautiful Pokémon. There are many works of art featuring Milotic.

attacks.name: Float On
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this Pokémon does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: It is the shabbiest Pokémon of all. It forms in schools and lives at the bottom of rivers.

attacks.name: Knock Off
attacks.effect: Discard a random card from your opponent's hand.

flavorText: Its hardy vitality enables it to adapt to any environment. Its pincers will never release prey.

attacks.name: Earthquake
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage to each of your Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: It makes its nest at the bottom of swamps. It will eat anything—if it is alive, Whiscash will eat it.

attacks.name: Amnesia
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Active Pokémon's attacks. That Pokémon can't use that attack during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Rising Lunge
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavorText: It makes its nest at the bottom of swamps. It will eat anything—if it is alive, Whiscash will eat it.
Its whiskers make a superb radar. They are used to locate prey, even in the murkiest of water.

attacks.name: High Breaching
attacks.effect: This Pokémon is now Asleep.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Astonish
attacks.effect: Choose a random card from your opponent's hand. Your opponent reveals that card and shuffles it into his or her deck.

attacks.name: Splash Dance
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon's Splash Dance attack does 60 more damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavorText: The rhythm of bright, festive music activates Ludicolo's cells, making it more powerful.

attacks.name: Hydro Pump
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 more damage for each Water Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: It can swim while towing a large ship. It bashes down foes with a swing of its thick arms.

attacks.name: Water Arrow
attacks.effect: This attack does 60 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: It can swim while towing a large ship. It bashes down foes with a swing of its thick arms.

attacks.name: Endeavor
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 more damage for each heads.

flavorText: Living on muddy ground that provides poor footing has made its legs sturdy.
To alert it, the fin on its head senses the flow of water. It has the strength to heft boulders.

attacks.name: Lunge
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: It appears in large numbers by seashores. At night, its central core flashes with a red light.

attacks.name: Knockout Needle
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. If both of them are heads, this attack does 40 more damage.

flavorText: It is capable of swimming backwards by rapidly flapping its winglike pectoral fins and stout tail.

attacks.name: Bubble
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: It makes its nest in the shade of corals. If it senses danger, it spits murky ink and flees.

attacks.name: Tumbling Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Explosive Jet
attacks.effect: Discard as many Fire Energy attached to your Pokémon as you like. This attack does 50 damage times the number of Energy cards you discarded.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Spreading Flames
attacks.effect: Attach 3 Fire Energy cards from your discard pile to your Pokémon in any way you like.

attacks.name: Heat Blow
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: When facing a tough foe, it looses flames from its wrists. Its powerful legs let it jump clear over buildings.

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavorText: During a battle, the hot flame in its body increases. Its kicks have outstanding destructive power.

attacks.name: Flare Bonus
attacks.effect: Discard a Fire Energy card from your hand. If you do, draw 2 cards.

attacks.name: Claw
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: A fire burns inside, so it feels very warm to hug. It launches fireballs of 1,800 degrees Fahrenheit.

attacks.name: Ember
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, discard a Fire Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: A fire burns inside, so it feels very warm to hug. It launches fireballs of 1,800 degrees Fahrenheit.

attacks.name: Indomitable Blaze
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon-EX, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavorText: Its body is as hot as lava and is always billowing. Flames will occasionally burst from its shell.

attacks.name: Flame Burst
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage to 2 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Flamethrower
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: Its body is as hot as lava and is always billowing. Flames will occasionally burst from its shell.

attacks.name: Grass Fire
attacks.effect: Discard a Grass Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: Its body is made of magma. If it doesn't keep moving, its body will cool and harden.

attacks.name: Flickering Flames
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavorText: Very smart and very vengeful. Grabbing one of its many tails could result in a 1,000-year curse.

attacks.name: Roar
attacks.effect: Your opponent switches his or her Active Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: While young, it has six gorgeous tails. When it grows, several new tails are sprouted.

attacks.name: Dark Forest
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Wood Blast
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each Grass Energy attached to this Pokémon.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Helping Hand
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a basic Energy card and attach it to 1 of your Benched Pokémon. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Twirling Sign
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: With its sweet aroma, it guides Volbeat to draw signs with light in the night sky.

attacks.name: Acrobatics
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 more damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Pester
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is affected by a Special Condition, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavorText: It lives around clean ponds. At night, its rear lights up. It converses with others by flashing its light.

attacks.name: Dynamic Punch
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage and your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: It scatters poisonous spores and throws powerful punches while its foe is hampered by inhaled spores.

attacks.name: Spore
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavorText: It spouts poison spores from the top of its head. These spores cause pain all over if inhaled.

attacks.name: Spiral Gyration
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused. Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Air Slash
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: It flaps its four wings to hover and fly freely in any direction–to and fro and sideways.
It appears as if it is skating on water. It draws prey with a sweet scent from the tip of its head.

attacks.name: Solar Ray
attacks.effect: Heal 20 damage from each of your Pokémon.

flavorText: The rhythm of bright, festive music activates Ludicolo's cells, making it more powerful.
It has a mischievous spirit. If it spots an angler, it will tug on the fishing line to interfere.
It searches about for clean water. If it does not drink water for too long, the leaf on its head wilts.

attacks.name: Leaf Blade
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Power Poison
attacks.effect: Discard 1 Energy attached to this Pokémon. Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavorText: It agilely leaps about the jungle and uses the sharp leaves on its arms to strike its prey.
It agilely leaps about the jungle and uses the sharp leaves on its arms to strike its prey.

attacks.name: Agility
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to this Pokémon during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: It lives in dense jungles. While closing in on its prey, it leaps from branch to branch.

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage.

flavorText: Small hooks on the bottom of its feet catch on walls and ceilings. That is how it can hang from above.

attacks.name: Mega Drain
attacks.effect: Heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Grass Knot
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 more damage for each Colorless in your opponent's Active Pokémon's Retreat Cost.

flavorText: Its vines grow so profusely that, in the warm season, you can't even see its eyes.

attacks.name: Absorb
attacks.effect: Heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.

flavorText: It tangles any moving thing with its vines. Their subtle shaking is ticklish if you get ensnared.

attacks.name: Allergic Shock
attacks.effect: During your next turn, if the Defending Pokémon is damaged by an attack, it is Knocked Out.

attacks.name: Twineedle
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 50 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: May appear in a swarm. Flies at violent speeds, all the while stabbing with the toxic stinger on its rear.
While awaiting evolution, it hides from predators under leaves and in nooks of branches.

attacks.name: Multiply
attacks.effect: Search your deck for Weedle and put it onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward.

flavorText: Its poison stinger is very powerful. Its bright-colored body is intended to warn off its enemies.
